        "contents": "// 代理选择 Hook\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\n\n  // 缓存\n  const config = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\n    }),\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\n  );\n\n  // 切换节点：先等核心与 profile 同步完成，再刷新代理列表，避免过早刷新拿到旧 now 导致界面「选不上」\n  const changeProxy = useCallback(\n    async (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\n      // 标记手动选择节点，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知\n      markManualProxySelectionStarted();\n\n      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e {\n        if (!current || skipConfigSave) return;\n        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\n        const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\n        if (index \u003c 0) {\n          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\n        } else {\n          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\n        }\n        await patchCurrent({ selected });\n      };\n\n      // 先完成核心切换与 profile 写入，再刷新代理列表；不在切换前刷新，否则会拿到旧 now 导致界面显示旧节点\n      Promise.all([\n        selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName),\n        doPatchCurrent(),\n        syncTrayProxySelection(),\n      ])\n        .then(() =\u003e {\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理和状态同步完成: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          );\n          onSuccess?.();\n        })\n        .catch((err) =\u003e {\n          console.warn(\"[ProxySelection] 后台同步失败:\", err);\n          onSuccess?.();\n        });\n\n      // 3. 后台清理连接（异步，不阻塞）\n      if\n    }\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n proxyOptions.map((proxy) =\u003e {\n                    const delayValue =\n                      state.proxyData.records[proxy.name] \u0026\u0026\n                      state.selection.group\n                        ?         "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.store\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.Store\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.asStoreProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.ProxySort\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.AppInfoSort\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.DarkMode\n\nclass UiStore(context: Context) {\n    private val store = Store(\n        context\n            .getSharedPreferences(PREFERENCE_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)\n            .asStoreProvider()\n    )\n\n    var enableVpn: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"enable_vpn\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var darkMode: DarkMode by store.enum(\n        key = \"dark_mode\",\n        defaultValue = DarkMode.Auto,\n        values = DarkMode.values()\n    )\n\n    var hideAppIcon: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"hide_app_icon\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var proxyExcludeNotSelectable by store.boolean(\n        key = \"proxy_exclude_not_selectable\",\n        defaultValue = false,\n    )\n\n    var proxyLine: Int by store.int(\n        key = \"proxy_line\",\n        defaultValue = 3\n    )\n\n    var proxySort: ProxySort by store.enum(\n        key = \"proxy_sort\",\n        defaultValue = ProxySort.Default,\n        values = ProxySort.values()\n    )\n\n    var proxyLastGroup: String by store.string(\n        key = \"proxy_last_group\",\n        defaultValue = \"\"\n    )\n\n    var accessControlSort: AppInfoSort by store.enum(\n        key = \"access_control_sort\",\n        defaultValue = AppInfoSort.Label,\n        values = AppInfoSort.values(),\n    )\n\n    var accessControlReverse: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"access_control_reverse\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var accessControlSystemApp: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"access_control_system_app\",\n        defaultValue = false,\n    )\n\n    companion object {\n        private const val PREFERENCE_NAME = \"ui\"\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ProxyPage = () =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n\n  const { clashConfig, refreshClashConfig } = useAppData();\n  const { verge, patchVerge, mutateVerge } = useVerge();\n  const { clash, patchClash, mutateClash } = useClash();\n  const { isTunModeAvailable } = useSystemState();\n\n  const modeList = useMemo(() =\u003e MODES, []);\n\n  const normalizedMode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase();\n  const curMode = isMode(normalizedMode) ? normalizedMode : undefined;\n\n  const onChangeMode = useLockFn(async (mode: Mode) =\u003e {\n    if (mode !== curMode \u0026\u0026 verge?.auto_close_connection) {\n      closeAllConnections();\n    }\n    await patchClashMode(mode);\n    refreshClashConfig();\n  });\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (normalizedMode \u0026\u0026 !isMode(normalizedMode)) {\n      onChangeMode(\"rule\");\n    }\n  }, [normalizedMode, onChangeMode]);\n\n  const { enable_tun_mode } = verge ?? {};\n  const allowLan = clash?.[\"allow-lan\"] ?? false;\n\n  const handleTunToggle = useLockFn(async (value: boolean) =\u003e {\n    if (!isTunModeAvailable) {\n      showNotice.error(\n        t(\"settings.sections.proxyControl.tooltips.tunUnavailable\"),\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n    if (value) markProxyModeChanged();\n    mutateVerge({ ...verge, enable_tun_mode: value }, false);\n    await patchVerge({ enable_tun_mode: value });\n  });\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBasePage\n      full\n      contentStyle={{ height: \"101.5%\" }}\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.adapter\n\nimport android.view.ViewGroup\nimport androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.component.ProxyView\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.component.ProxyViewConfig\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.component.ProxyViewState\n\nclass ProxyAdapter(\n    private val config: ProxyViewConfig,\n    private val clicked: (String) -\u003e Unit,\n) : RecyclerView.Adapter\u003cProxyAdapter.Holder\u003e() {\n    class Holder(val view: ProxyView) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(view)\n\n    var selectable: Boolean = false\n    var states: List\u003cProxyViewState\u003e = emptyList()\n\n    override fun onCreateViewHolder(parent: ViewGroup, viewType: Int): Holder {\n        return Holder(ProxyView(config.context, config))\n    }\n\n    override fun onBindViewHolder(holder: Holder, position: Int) {\n        val current = states[position]\n\n        holder.view.apply {\n            state = current\n\n            setOnClickListener {\n                clicked(current.proxy.name)\n            }\n\n            val isSelector = selectable\n\n            isFocusable = isSelector\n            isClickable = isSelector\n\n            current.update(true)\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun getItemCount(): Int {\n        return states.size\n    }\n}",

        "contents": "package tunnel\n\nimport (\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/dlclark/regexp2\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n)\n\ntype SortMode int\n\nconst (\n\tDefault SortMode = iota\n\tTitle\n\tDelay\n)\n\ntype Proxy struct {\n\tName     string &#96;json:\"name\"&#96;\n\tTitle    string &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;\n\tSubtitle string &#96;json:\"subtitle\"&#96;\n\tType     string &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;\n\tDelay    int    &#96;json:\"delay\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype ProxyGroup struct {\n\tType       string   &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;\n\tNow        string   &#96;json:\"now\"&#96;\n\tNowIsManual bool    &#96;json:\"now-is-manual\"&#96;\n\tProxies    []*Proxy &#96;json:\"proxies\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype sortableProxyList struct {\n\tlist []*Proxy\n\tless func(a, b *Proxy) bool\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Len() int {\n\treturn len(s.list)\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Less(i, j int) bool {\n\treturn s.less(s.list[i], s.list[j])\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Swap(i, j int) {\n\ts.list[i], s.list[j] = s.list[j], s.list[i]\n}\n\nfunc QueryProxyGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable bool) []string {\n\tmode := tunnel.Mode()\n\n\tif mode == tunnel.Direct {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tglobal := tunnel.Proxies()[\"GLOBAL\"].Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tproxies := global.Providers()[0].Proxies()\n\tresult := make([]string, 0, len(proxies)+1)\n\n\tif mode == tunnel.Global {\n\t\tresult = append(result, \"GLOBAL\")\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, p := range proxies {\n\t\tif _, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup); ok {\n\t\t\tif !excludeNotSelectable || p.Type() == C.Selector || p.Type() == C.Fallback || p.Type() == C.URLTest {\n\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, p.Name())\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn result\n}\n\nfunc QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode,",

        "contents": "export const useProxySelection = \nconst changeProxy = \nasync (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n\n(err) =\u003e {\n\n          onSuccess?.();\n        });\n\n      // 3. 后台清理连接（异步，不阻塞）\n      if (\n        config.enableConnectionCleanup \u0026\u0026\n        config.autoCloseConnection \u0026\u0026\n        previousProxy\n      ) {\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e cleanupConnections(previousProxy), 0);\n      }\n    },\n    [current, patchCurrent, config, onSuccess, onError],\n  );\n\n  const handleSelectChange = useCallback(\n    (\n      groupName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e\n      (event: { target: { value: string } }) =\u003e {\n        const newProxy = event.target.value;\n        changeProxy(groupName, newProxy, previousProxy, skipConfigSave);\n      },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  const handleProxyGroupChange = useCallback(\n    (group: { name: string; now?: string }, proxy: { name: string }) =\u003e {\n      changeProxy(group.name, proxy.name, group.now);\n    },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  return {\n    changeProxy,\n    handleSelectChange,\n    handleProxyGroupChange,\n  };\n};",

          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "const STORAGE_KEY_PROXY = \"clash-verge-selected-proxy\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "const STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE = \"clash-verge-proxy-sort-type\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "const AUTO_CHECK_DEFAULT_INTERVAL_MINUTES = 5;"

            "text": "const AUTO_CHECK_INITIAL_DELAY_MS = 100;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "// 代理节点信息接口"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "interface ProxyOption {"

            "isSignature": true,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \n\n\n  // 处理代理组选择菜单\n  const handleGroupMenuOpen = (event: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(event.currentTarget);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupMenuClose = () =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupSelect = (groupName: string) =\u003e {\n    setSelectedGroup(groupName);\n    handleGroupMenuClose();\n\n    if (isChainMode \u0026\u0026 mode === \"rule\") {\n      updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime(null);\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-group\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-exit-node\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n      setProxyChain([]);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleChangeProxy = useCallback(\n    (group: IProxyGroupItem, proxy: IProxyItem) =\u003e {\n      if (isChainMode) {\n        // 使用函数式更新来避免状态延迟问题\n        setProxyChain((prev) =\u003e {\n          // 检查是否已经存在相同名称的代理，防止重复添加\n          if (prev.some((item) =\u003e item.name === proxy.name)) {\n            const warningMessage = t(\"proxies.page.chain.duplicateNode\");\n            setDuplicateWarning({\n              open: true,\n              message: warningMessage,\n            });\n            return prev; // 返回原来的状态，不做任何更改\n          }\n\n          // 安全获取延迟数据，如果没有延迟数据则设为 undefined\n          const delay =\n            proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0\n              ? proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay\n              : undefined;\n\n          const chainItem: ProxyChainItem = {\n            id: &#96;${proxy.name}_${Date.now()}&#96;,\n            name: proxy.name,\n            type: proxy.type,\n            delay: delay,\n          };\n\n          return [...prev, chainItem];\n        });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (![\"Selector\", \"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) return;\n\n      handleProxyGroupChange(group, proxy);\n    },\n    [handleProxyGroupChange, isChainMode, t],\n  );\n;",

        "contents": "export const SysproxyViewer = (props, ref) =\u003e {\n\n\n  useImperativeHandle(ref, () =\u003e ({\n    open: () =\u003e {\n      setOpen(true);\n      setValue({\n        guard: enable_proxy_guard,\n        enable_bypass_check: enable_bypass_check ?? true,\n        bypass: system_proxy_bypass,\n        duration: proxy_guard_duration ?? 10,\n        use_default: use_default_bypass ?? true,\n        pac: proxy_auto_config,\n        pac_content: pac_file_content ?? DEFAULT_PAC,\n        proxy_host: proxy_host ?? \"127.0.0.1\",\n      });\n      getSystemProxy().then((p) =\u003e setSysproxy(p));\n      getAutotemProxy().then((p) =\u003e setAutoproxy(p));\n      fetchNetworkInterfaces();\n    },\n    close: () =\u003e setOpen(false),\n  }));\n\n  // 获取网络接口和主机名\n  const fetchNetworkInterfaces = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      // 获取系统网络接口信息\n      const interfaces = await getNetworkInterfacesInfo();\n      const ipAddresses: string[] = [];\n\n      // 从interfaces中提取IPv4和IPv6地址\n      interfaces.forEach((iface) =\u003e {\n        iface.addr.forEach((address) =\u003e {\n          if (address.V4 \u0026\u0026 address.V4.ip) {\n            ipAddresses.push(address.V4.ip);\n          }\n          if (address.V6 \u0026\u0026 address.V6.ip) {\n            ipAddresses.push(address.V6.ip);\n          }\n        });\n      });\n\n      // 获取当前系统的主机名\n      let hostname = \"\";\n      try {\n        hostname = await getSystemHostname();\n        debugLog(\"获取到主机名:\", hostname);\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"获取主机名失败:\", err);\n      }\n\n      // 构建选项列表\n      const options = [\"127.0.0.1\", \"localhost\"];\n\n      // 确保主机名添加到列表，即使它是空字符串也记录下来\n;\n};",

        "contents": "import {\n  closestCenter,\n  DndContext,\n  DragEndEvent,\n  KeyboardSensor,\n  PointerSensor,\n  useSensor,\n  useSensors,\n} from \"@dnd-kit/core\";\nimport {\n  arrayMove,\n  SortableContext,\n  sortableKeyboardCoordinates,\n  useSortable,\n  verticalListSortingStrategy,\n} from \"@dnd-kit/sortable\";\nimport { CSS } from \"@dnd-kit/utilities\";\nimport {\n  Delete as DeleteIcon,\n  DragIndicator,\n  Link,\n  LinkOff,\n} from \"@mui/icons-material\";\nimport {\n  Alert,\n  Box,\n  Button,\n  Chip,\n  IconButton,\n  Paper,\n  Typography,\n  useTheme,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\nimport {\n  closeAllConnections,\n  selectNodeForGroup,\n} from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport { markManualProxySelectionStarted } from \"@/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify\";\nimport { useAppData } from \"@/providers/app-data-context\";\nimport { updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime } from \"@/services/cmds\";\nimport { debugLog } from \"@/utils/debug\";\n\ninterface ProxyChainItem {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  type?: string;\n  delay?: number;\n}\n\ninterface ParsedChainConfig {\n  proxies?\n;\n}",

        "contents": "const ProxyControlSwitches = ({\n  label,\n  onError,\n  noRightPadding = false,\n}: ProxySwitchProps) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const { verge, mutateVerge, patchVerge } = useVerge();\n  const { installServiceAndRestartCore } = useServiceInstaller();\n  const { uninstallServiceAndRestartCore } = useServiceUninstaller();\n  const { configState: systemProxyConfigState, toggleSystemProxy } =\n    useSystemProxyState();\n  const { isServiceOk, isTunModeAvailable, mutateSystemState } =\n    useSystemState();\n\n  const sysproxyRef = useRef\u003cDialogRef\u003e(null);\n  const tunRef = useRef\u003cDialogRef\u003e(null);\n\n  const { enable_tun_mode } = verge ?? {};\n\n  const showErrorNotice = useCallback(\n    (msg: string) =\u003e showNotice.error(msg),\n    [],\n  );\n\n  const handleTunToggle = async (value: boolean) =\u003e {\n    if (!isTunModeAvailable) {\n      const msgKey = \"settings.sections.proxyControl.tooltips.tunUnavailable\";\n      showErrorNotice(msgKey);\n      throw new Error(t(msgKey));\n    }\n    // 启用 TUN 模式时标记，1分钟内不发送 fallback 切换通知\n    if (value) {\n      markProxyModeChanged();\n    }\n    mutateVerge({ ...verge, enable_tun_mode: value }, false);\n    await patchVerge({ enable_tun_mode: value });\n  };\n\n  const onInstallService = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      await installServiceAndRestartCore();\n      await mutateSystemState();\n    } catch (err) {\n      showNotice.error(err);\n    }\n  });\n\n  const onUninstallService = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      if (verge?.enable_tun_mode) {\n        await handleTunToggle(false);\n      }\n      await uninstallServiceAndRestartCore();\n      await mutateSystemState();\n    } catch (err) {\n      showNotice.error(err);\n    }\n  });\n\n  const isSystemProxyMode =\n    label === t(\"settings.sections.system.toggles.systemProxy\") || !label;\n  const isTunMode = label === t(\"settings.sections.system.toggles.tunMode\");\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBox sx={{ width: \"100%\", pr: noRightPadding ? 1 : 2 }}\u003e\n;",

            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "      const msgKey = \"settings.sections.proxyControl.tooltips.tunUnavailable\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "      showErrorNotice(msgKey);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "      throw new Error(t(msgKey));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    // 启用 TUN 模式时标记，1分钟内不发送 fallback 切换通知"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    if (value) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "      markProxyModeChanged();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    mutateVerge({ ...verge, enable_tun_mode: value }, false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    await patchVerge({ enable_tun_mode: value });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "  const onInstallService = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "      await installServiceAndRestartCore();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "      await mutateSystemState();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    } catch (err) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "      showNotice.error(err);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "  const onUninstallService = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "      if (verge?.enable_tun_mode) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "        await handleTunToggle(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "      await uninstallServiceAndRestartCore();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "      await mutateSystemState();"

          {

          },
          {

            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "  const isSystemProxyMode ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,

          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 获取当前代理节点信息的自定义Hook\nexport const useCurrentProxy = () =\u003e {\n  // 从AppDataProvider获取数据\n  const { proxies, clashConfig, refreshProxy } = useAppData();\n\n  // 获取当前模式\n  const currentMode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";\n\n  // 获取当前代理节点信息\n  const currentProxyInfo = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName: null };\n\n    const { global, groups, records } = proxies;\n\n    // 默认信息\n    let primaryGroupName = \"GLOBAL\";\n    let currentName = global?.now;\n\n    // 在规则模式下，寻找主要代理组（通常是第一个或者名字包含特定关键词的组）\n    if (currentMode === \"rule\" \u0026\u0026 groups.length \u003e 0) {\n      // 查找主要的代理组（优先级：包含关键词 \u003e 第一个非GLOBAL组）\n      const primaryKeywords = [\n        \"auto\",\n        \"select\",\n        \"proxy\",\n        \"节点选择\",\n        \"自动选择\",\n      ];\n      const primaryGroup =\n        groups.find((group: ProxyGroup) =\u003e\n          primaryKeywords.some((keyword) =\u003e\n            group.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword.toLowerCase()),\n          ),\n        ) || groups.filter((g: ProxyGroup) =\u003e g.name !== \"GLOBAL\")[0];\n\n      if (primaryGroup) {\n        primaryGroupName = primaryGroup.name;\n        currentName = primaryGroup.now;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 如果找不到当前节点，返回null\n    if (!currentName) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName };\n\n    // 获取完整的节点信息\n    const currentProxy = records[currentName] || {\n      name: currentName,\n      type: \"Unknown\",\n      udp: false,\n      xudp: false,\n      tfo: false,\n      mptcp: false,\n      smux: false,\n      history: [],\n    };\n\n    return { currentProxy, primaryGroupName };\n  }, [proxies, currentMode]);\n\n  return {\n    currentProxy: currentProxyInfo.currentProxy,\n    primaryGroupName: currentProxyInfo.primaryGroupName,\n    mode: currentMode,\n    refreshProxy,\n  };\n};",

        "contents": "const ProxyControlSwitches = \nconst ;\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBox sx={{ width: \"100%\", pr: noRightPadding ? 1 : 2 }}\u003e\n      {isSystemProxyMode \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cSwitchRow\n          label={t(\"settings.sections.proxyControl.fields.systemProxy\")}\n          active={systemProxyConfigState}\n          infoTitle={t(\"settings.sections.proxyControl.tooltips.systemProxy\")}\n          onInfoClick={() =\u003e sysproxyRef.current?.open()}\n          onToggle={(value) =\u003e toggleSystemProxy(value)}\n          onError={onError}\n          highlight={systemProxyConfigState}\n        /\u003e\n      )}\n\n      {isTunMode \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cSwitchRow\n          label={\n            t(\"settings.sections.proxyControl.fields.tunMode\") +\n            (!isTunModeAvailable\n              ? \" \" +\n                t(\"settings.sections.proxyControl.fields.tunModeRequiresAdmin\")\n              : \"\")\n          }\n          active={enable_tun_mode || false}\n          infoTitle={t(\"settings.sections.proxyControl.tooltips.tunMode\")}\n          onInfoClick={() =\u003e tunRef.current?.open()}\n          onToggle={handleTunToggle}\n          onError={onError}\n          disabled={!isTunModeAvailable}\n          highlight={enable_tun_mode || false}\n          extraIcons={\n            \u003c\u003e\n              {\n;",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.ProxyGroupRefresh\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.util.intent\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.Clash\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.TunnelState\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.Proxy\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.ProxyDesign\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.ProxyState\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.withClash\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.delay\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.isActive\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.selects.select\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.sync.Semaphore\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.sync.withPermit\n\nclass ProxyActivity : BaseActivity\u003cProxyDesign\u003e() {\n    override suspend fun main() {\n        val mode = withClash { queryOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session).mode }\n        val names = withClash { queryProxyGroupNames(uiStore.proxyExcludeNotSelectable) }\n        val states = List(names.size) { ProxyState(\"?\", false) }\n        val unorderedStates = names.indices.map { names[it] to states[it] }.toMap()\n        val reloadLock = Semaphore(3)\n\n        val design = ProxyDesign(\n            this,\n            mode,\n            names,\n            uiStore\n        )\n\n        setContentDesign(design)\n\n        design.requests.send(ProxyDesign.Request.ReloadAll)\n\n        while (isActive) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const { mode, isChainMode = false, chainConfigData } = props;\n  const [proxyChain, setProxyChain] = useState\u003cProxyChainItem[]\u003e(() =\u003e {\n    try {\n      const saved = localStorage.getItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n      if (saved) {\n        return JSON.parse(saved);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // ignore\n    }\n    return [];\n  });\n  const [selectedGroup, setSelectedGroup] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (proxyChain.length \u003e 0) {\n      localStorage.setItem(\"proxy-chain-items\", JSON.stringify(proxyChain));\n    } else {\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n    }\n  }, [proxyChain]);\n  const [ruleMenuAnchor, setRuleMenuAnchor] = useState\u003cnull | HTMLElement\u003e(\n    null,\n  );\n  const [duplicateWarning, setDuplicateWarning] = useState\u003c{\n    open: boolean;\n    message: string;\n  }\u003e({ open: false, message: \"\" });\n\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const { proxies: proxiesData } = useAppData();\n  const { current, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles } = useProfiles();\n  const groups = proxiesData?.groups;\n\n  // 使用核心返回的 group.now 标记每个组当前使用的节点\n  const selectedByGroup = useMemo((): Map\u003cstring, string\u003e =\u003e {\n    const g = groups;\n    if (!g?.length) return new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();\n    return new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e(\n      g\n        .filter(\n          (x: { name?: string; now?: string }) =\u003e\n            x.name != null \u0026\u0026 x.now != null,\n        )\n        .map(\n          (x: { name: string; now: string }) =\u003e\n            [x.name, x.now] as [string, string],\n        ),\n    );\n  }, [groups]);\n\n  const getSelectedForGroup = useCallback(\n    (groupName: string): string | undefined =\u003e selectedByGroup.get(groupName),\n    [selectedByGroup],\n  );\n\n  // 当 group.now 是子分组名时，解析出该子分组当前使用的节点名，用于组头显示「分组名 (实际节点)」\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp) *ProxyGroup {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tproxies := convertProxies(g.Proxies(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\t// \tproxies := collectProviders(g.Providers(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\n\tswitch sortMode {\n\tcase Title:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn strings.Compare(a.Title, b.Title) \u003c 0\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Delay:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn a.Delay \u003c b.Delay\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Default:\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n\n\tnowIsManual := false\n\tif manualable, ok := g.(outboundgroup.NowIsManualAble); ok {\n\t\tnowIsManual = manualable.NowIsManual()\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026ProxyGroup{\n\t\tType:        g.Type().String(),\n\t\tNow:         g.Now(),\n\t\tNowIsManual: nowIsManual,\n\t\tProxies:     proxies,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc PatchSelector(selector, name string) bool {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[selector]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", selector)\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts, ok := g.(outboundgroup.SelectAble)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.Set(name); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: %s\", selector, err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Patch selector %s -\u003e %s\", selector, name)\n\n\tcloseConnByGroup(selector)\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc convertProxies(proxies []C.Proxy, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  Box,\n  Button,\n  ButtonGroup,\n  FormControlLabel,\n  Switch,\n  Typography,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useLockFn } from \"ahooks\";\nimport { useEffect, useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\nimport { closeAllConnections } from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport { BasePage } from \"@/components/base\";\nimport { GuardState } from \"@/components/setting/mods/guard-state\";\nimport { markProxyModeChanged } from \"@/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify\";\nimport { useClash } from \"@/hooks/use-clash\";\nimport { useVerge } from \"@/hooks/use-verge\";\nimport { useAppData } from \"@/providers/app-data-context\";\nimport { patchClashMode } from \"@/services/cmds\";\nimport { useSystemState } from \"@/hooks/use-system-state\";\nimport { showNotice } from \"@/services/notice-service\";\nimport { ProviderButton } from \"@/components/proxy/provider-button\";\nimport { ProviderButton as RuleProviderButton } from \"@/components/rule/provider-button\";\nimport { ProxyGroups } from \"@/components/proxy/proxy-groups\";\n\nconst MODES = [\"rule\", \"global\", \"direct\"] as const;\ntype Mode = (typeof MODES)[number];\nconst MODE_SET = new Set\u003cstring\u003e(MODES);\nconst isMode = (value: unknown): value is Mode =\u003e\n;",

下面按「核心 → API → 前端」把电脑端代理界面和 Fallback 相关逻辑串起来说明。

---

# 电脑端代理界面与 Fallback 逻辑说明

## 一、整体结构

- **电脑端界面**：`clash-verge-rev`（Tauri + React）
- **代理核心**：`core/src/foss/golang/clash`（Go，mihomo）
- **Fallback 组**：核心里的一种「可自动 + 可手动固定」的代理组，界面和 Selector/URLTest 一起当「可选节点」处理。

---

## 二、核心层：Fallback 组（Go）

**文件**：`core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go`

### 2.1 行为概览

- **自动**：按配置顺序找第一个「存活且延迟 ≤ timeout」的节点；若都没有，则选延迟最小的。
- **手动**：用户选定节点后，会写入 `selected`；只有在该节点仍存活时才用，否则清空 `selected` 并回退到自动逻辑。

### 2.2 关键字段与接口

- `selected`：当前手动固定的节点名；空表示未固定，走自动。
- `testUrl` / `expectedStatus`：测速地址与期望状态。
- `selectedTimeout`：对手动选中节点的测速超时（0 则用组默认 timeout）。
- 实现接口：`ProxyGroup`、`SelectAble`（`Set`/`ForceSet`）、`NowIsManualAble`（`NowIsManual`）、`ClearManualSelectionAble`（`ClearManualSelection`）。

### 2.3 选节点逻辑：`findAliveProxy(touch bool)`

1. 若 `selected == ""`：  
   顺序遍历子节点，用 `AliveForTestUrl` + `LastDelayForTestUrl <= timeout` 选第一个可用。
2. 若 `selected != ""`：  
   只认该节点；用 `selectedTimeout`（或默认）做一次 URLTest，存活则返回，否则清空 `selected` 再按 1 自动选。
3. 若没有任何存活：  
   在全部节点里选「测速延迟最小」的作为「最不差」的节点使用。

### 2.4 手动选择：`Set(name string)`

- 校验 `name` 在组内存在，然后 `f.selected = name`。
- 后台异步对该节点做 URLTest，不阻塞返回（和安卓端一致）。

### 2.5 其它

- `Now()`：返回当前实际使用的节点名（来自 `findAliveProxy(false)`）。
- `NowIsManual()`：`selected != ""` 即视为手动。
- `ClearManualSelection()`：`selected = ""`，恢复自动。
- JSON 暴露：`now`、`all`、`fixed`（即 selected）、`testUrl`、`selectedTimeout` 等，供前端和 API 使用。

---

## 三、核心 API 与 Fallback

**路由**：`core/.../hub/route/proxies.go`、`groups.go`

- **选节点**：`PUT /proxies/{name}`，body `{ "name": "节点名" }`。  
  - `name` 是**代理组名**（如你的 Fallback 组名）。  
  - 内部取该组 adapter，断言为 `outboundgroup.SelectAble`，调用 `Set(req.Name)`，这里的 `req.Name` 才是**要选中的子节点名**。  
  - Fallback 实现了 `SelectAble`，所以选 Fallback 组内某个节点就是通过这个 API + `Set` 完成的。
- **测速并清空手动**：`GET /proxies/{name}/delay?url=...&timeout=...` 是单节点延迟；  
  组测速用 `GET /groups/{name}/delay?url=...&timeout=...`。  
  - 在 `groups.go` 里，对 URLTest/Fallback 等会先 `selectAble.ForceSet("")` 再 `group.URLTest(...)`，即**组测速会清空该组的手动选择**，界面「当前节点」会回到自动结果。

所以：  
- 界面「选节点」→ 调用核心 `PUT /proxies/{Fallback组名}`，body 里是子节点名 → 核心 Fallback.`Set(子节点名)`。  
- 界面「测速」→ 调用组 delay API → 核心清空该组手动再测速 → 前端刷新代理数据后显示新的 `now`。

---

## 四、电脑端界面数据流

### 4.1 代理数据来源：`AppDataProvider`

**文件**：`clash-verge-rev/src/providers/app-data-provider.tsx`

- 用 SWR 请求核心（通过 tauri-plugin-mihomo-api）拿到 `proxies`（含 `groups`、`records`、`global` 等）。
- `groups` 里每个 group 有 `name`、`type`、`now`、`all` 等；Fallback 的 `type === "Fallback"`，`now` 即当前使用的节点。

### 4.2 启动时对 url-test / fallback 的测速

- 当 `proxiesData.groups` 首次有数据且尚未触发过时：
  - 筛出 `type === "url-test"` 或 `type === "fallback"` 的组。
  - 对每组调用 `delayGroup(group.name, url, timeout)` 触发核心测速，然后 `refreshProxy()`。
  - 用 `initialNowByGroupRef` 记下各组初始 `now`，并启动轮询（约 1.5s 一次，最多 16 次）：  
    若某次数据里所有 url-test/fallback 的 `now` 相对初始值都变了，或轮询到上限，就停止。
- 同时调用 `markManualDelayCheckStarted()`，进入「手动测速冷却」，这段时间内**不会发 Fallback 切换通知**（见下）。

### 4.3 配置重载 / Profile 切换

- 监听 `verge://refresh-clash-config`、`profile-changed` 等：  
  - 会把 `hasTriggeredStartupFallback` 置为 false，以便下次再对 url-test/fallback 做一次启动测速。  
- 监听 `verge://refresh-proxy-config`：  
  - 由托盘切换节点成功后发出，会调用 `markManualProxySelectionStarted()`，同样用于抑制 Fallback 切换通知。

---

## 五、代理选择（含 Fallback）

**文件**：`clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-proxy-selection.ts`

- `changeProxy(groupName, proxyName, previousProxy?, skipConfigSave?)`：
  1. 调用 `markManualProxySelectionStarted()`（10 秒内不报 Fallback 自动切换）。
  2. `selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName)`（内部对应核心 `PUT /proxies/{groupName}`，body 里是 proxyName）。
  3. 把当前 profile 的 `selected` 里该组的 `now` 更新为 `proxyName`（`patchCurrent`）。
  4. `syncTrayProxySelection()` 同步托盘菜单。
  5. 若开启「切换时关闭连接」且传了 `previousProxy`，会异步清理使用旧节点的连接。

对 Fallback 来说，`groupName` 是 Fallback 组名，`proxyName` 是你要固定的子节点名；核心里就是对该组调用 `Set(proxyName)`。

---

## 六、Fallback 切换通知与冷却

**文件**：`clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify.ts`

- 监听 `proxiesData.groups`，对每个 `type === "URLTest"` 或 `"Fallback"` 的组记录上一轮的 `now`。
- 当某组 `now` 从 A 变成 B（且不是首次初始化）：
  - 从当前 profile 的 `selected` 里删掉该组（界面不再显示「当前节点」为手动）。
  - 若**不在**下面任一带宽内，则调用 `invoke("notify_fallback_proxy_switched", { group, from: A, to: B })` 发系统通知。

**冷却期（这段时间内不发 Fallback 切换通知）**：

- 关闭连接开始后 10 秒：`markCloseConnectionsStarted`。
- TUN/系统代理模式切换后 1 分钟：`markProxyModeChanged`。
- 手动测速开始后 10 秒：`markManualDelayCheckStarted`。
- 手动选择节点后 10 秒：`markManualProxySelectionStarted`。

这样可避免：你刚关连接、刚测速、刚自己换了节点，就弹「节点自动切换」的误报。

---

## 七、代理列表与当前代理卡片

### 7.1 代理组列表：`ProxyGroups`

**文件**：`clash-verge-rev/src/components/proxy/proxy-groups.tsx`

- 用 `proxiesData.groups` 得到 `selectedByGroup`（每个组的 `now`）。
- 对 Selector / URLTest / **Fallback** 都允许点击子节点切换；点击时调用 `handleProxyGroupChange(group, proxy)` → `useProxySelection` 的 `changeProxy`。
- **测速（Check All）**：  
  - 先 `markManualDelayCheckStarted()`；  
  - 从当前 profile 的 `selected` 里移除该组（和核心测速清空手动一致）；  
  - 调 `delayGroup(groupName, url, timeout)` 等做测速；  
  - 测完再确保 profile 里该组被移除，并刷新列表。

### 7.2 单条代理展示：`ProxyItem` / `ProxyItemMini`

**文件**：`proxy-item.tsx`、`proxy-item-mini.tsx`

- 延迟显示：优先用 `delayManager.getDelayFix(proxy, group.name)`（本地缓存或 `proxy.history`），Fallback 和 URLTest 一样会用到 `proxy.history` 里核心测速结果。
- **「手动选择」图标**：  
  - 仅当 `getManualSelectionForGroup(groupName)` 返回值等于该节点名时显示。  
  - 即：profile 里该组的 `selected.now` 与核心当前 `group.now` 一致时，才显示为「当前手动选的」。  
  - Fallback 组：显示为 📌；Selector/URLTest 显示为 `LabelOutlined`。  
- Fallback 组内点击节点：和 Selector/URLTest 一样走 `onChangeProxy(group, proxy)` → 选节点。

### 7.3 当前代理卡片：`CurrentProxyCard`

**文件**：`clash-verge-rev/src/components/home/current-proxy-card.tsx`

- 只把 `type` 为 **Selector、URLTest、Fallback** 的组放进下拉（规则模式还会考虑 MATCH 策略等）。
- 组列表来自 `proxies.groups` 过滤，当前选中来自 `group.now`；切换用 `useProxySelection` 的 `handleSelectChange`。
- 同样在测速时调用 `markManualDelayCheckStarted()`，避免测速触发的切换被当成「自动切换」通知。

---

## 八、延迟与测速（与 Fallback 的关系）

**文件**：`clash-verge-rev/src/services/delay.ts`

- `getGroupDelayTimeout(group, isManualSelection)`：  
  若该组有 `selectedTimeout` 且当前是手动选择，用 `selectedTimeout`，否则用 `timeout`。  
  Fallback 对手动选中节点会用 `selectedTimeout`（核心里一致）。
- `getDelayFix(proxy, group)`：  
  无 provider 时用本地 delay 缓存；有 provider 或无缓存时用 `proxy.history` 最后一条。  
  Fallback 组内节点延迟展示依赖核心测速结果和本地缓存。

---

## 九、关闭连接时对 Fallback 的测速

**文件**：`clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-close-all-with-delay-check.ts`

- 用户触发「关闭所有连接」时：  
  - 先 `markCloseConnectionsStarted()`（10 秒内不发 Fallback 切换通知）。  
  - 对各组（包括 Fallback）按配置做 delay 检测（`delayGroup` 等），再关闭连接。  
  - 这样关闭后核心会重新选节点，界面刷新后显示的 `now` 和实际一致，且不会立刻弹切换通知。

---

## 十、后端到前端的调用链（Fallback 选节点）

1. 用户在前端选 Fallback 组内某节点 →  
2. `useProxySelection.changeProxy(Fallback组名, 节点名)` →  
3. `selectNodeForGroup(Fallback组名, 节点名)`（tauri-plugin-mihomo-api）→  
4. 桌面端 Tauri：`profile::switch_proxy_node` → 核心 `Handle::select_node_for_group` →  
5. 核心 HTTP：`PUT /proxies/{Fallback组名}`，body `{ "name": "节点名" }` →  
6. `proxies.go` 里对 Fallback 组 adapter 调用 `Set(节点名)` →  
7. Fallback.`Set(name)` 写入 `selected`，异步测速；  
8. 前端 `patchCurrent({ selected })` 更新 profile，并 `refreshProxy()` 拿到新 `now`，界面更新。

---

## 十一、小结（Fallback 相关要点）

| 方面 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **核心** | Fallback 按顺序选第一个存活节点；支持 `Set` 固定节点，失败会清空并回退自动。 |
| **API** | 选节点 = `PUT /proxies/{组名}`；组测速 = `GET /groups/{组名}/delay`，会清空该组手动。 |
| **界面** | 与 Selector/URLTest 一起作为「可选组」，列表 + 当前代理卡片都可切换；显示「手动」图标（📌）当 profile 与 core 一致时。 |
| **通知** | 仅当 Fallback/URLTest 的 `now` 变化且不在「关连接/改模式/手动测速/手动选节点」的冷却期内才发系统通知。 |
| **启动** | 首次有代理数据时会对 url-test/fallback 触发测速并轮询直到 `now` 稳定或超次。 |
| **测速** | 界面「测速」会清空该组手动选择（前端 profile + 核心 ForceSet），再测速，避免误报切换。 |

这样覆盖了：核心 Fallback 行为、API、前端数据与选择、Fallback 专属的手动/通知/测速/启动逻辑，以及从界面到核心的完整调用链。若你某一块想对着具体文件看（例如只看 Fallback 或只看通知），可以说一下我按文件/行数再缩一版。
